decision_rule.boundary: No result changes the failed training conclusion or authorizes extra steps, seeds, simultaneous mechanisms, joint training, H1b-H6, tensor conditioning, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
decision_rule.degree: otherwise, if abs correlation of graph error with mean degree is at least 0.30 at two or more informative times, qualify one degree aggregation mechanism
decision_rule.high_noise: otherwise, if teacher-forced low/mid time is controlled but rollout deteriorates sharply only from t>=0.4, diagnose high-noise reconstruction before sampler tuning
decision_rule.remaining: otherwise retain the current path and attribute the remaining failure to state-dependent representation/optimization rather than a localized radial or degree mechanism
decision_rule.self_image: otherwise, if abs correlation with periodic self-image fraction is at least 0.30 at two or more informative times, qualify one self-image separation mechanism
decision_rule.short_range: if d<2A explained fraction trails 2-4A by at least 0.10 at two or more informative times, qualify one short-range radial-resolution mechanism
decision_rule.volume_normalized_chart: if raw graph MSE correlates with node count by at least 0.50 while dividing Cartesian tangent error by V^(1/3) reduces that correlation below 0.30 at two or more informative times, qualify one GL(3,Z)-invariant volume-normalized Cartesian output/loss chart
